title: T-046 — UI: TEC-030 Shelf Life Config + override modal
prompt: Build TEC-030 shelf life config screen per §9.5 with date code preview. Match `shelf_life_screen` design/Monopilot Design System/technical/other-screens.jsx:715-758 and `shelf_life_override_modal` design/Monopilot Design System/technical/modals.jsx:486-513. Includes V-TEC-30..32 surfacing (FG without shelf_life_days flagged). RED tests/ui/tec-030-shelf-life.test.tsx. Run: `pnpm vitest run tests/ui/tec-030-shelf-life.test.tsx`.

pipeline_inputs.description: Shelf life config list + override modal with regulatory presets and date-code preview.
pipeline_inputs.details: Date code preview component validates date_code_format pattern (YYWW|YYYY-MM-DD|JJWW|YYJJJ|custom regex) and renders sample for today.
acceptance_criteria: Given the screen renders, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/technical/other-screens.jsx:715-758 and design/Monopilot Design System/technical/modals.jsx:486-513, then list layout, preset chip list, and override modal field set match — structural + visual + interaction parity verified by RTL.
Given date_code_format='YYWW', when previewing today, then a 4-digit YYWW string is shown.
Given override modal saved, when API returns 200, then list refreshes.
test_strategy: RED tests for parity + format preview.
risk_red_lines: Do not allow saving shelf_life_mode outside enum.
